titles: 유가 12% 폭락, 근데 기름값은 왜 안 내려오나 | 4월 셋째주 주간총정리
호르무즈 열렸는데 진짜 위험한 건 따로 있다 | 코스피 6,200·SK하이닉스 40조
코스피 6,200 뚫었는데 환율은 왜 안 떨어지나 | S&P 7,000 시대의 함정

image_concepts.A: 이란 외교장관 아라그치 + 호르무즈 개방 선언 — 기자회견에서 단호한 표정으로 선언, 뒤로 WTI 12% 폭락 차트
image_concepts.B: 최태원 SK 회장 + 반도체 축제 — 환한 표정의 최태원 회장이 SK하이닉스 HBM4 칩을 들고 초록 상승 차트 앞에 서 있는 장면

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 A 실사. 이란 외교장관 아라그치(Abbas Araghchi)가 기자회견장에서 마이크 앞에 서서 단호한 표정으로 호르무즈 개방을 선언하는 장면. 카메라를 정면으로 응시하며 손을 제스처로 들고 있다. 뒤쪽 대형 스크린에 'WTI -12% $83' 빨간 하락 차트와 호르무즈 해협 지도가 표시됨. 기자들의 카메라 플래시가 터지는 긴장감.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic cinematic portrait of Abbas Araghchi (Iran Foreign Minister, middle-aged Iranian man in dark suit with trimmed beard) standing at a podium with multiple microphones, facing the camera with a firm serious expression and hand raised mid-gesture. Behind him, a large display screen shows a steep red declining oil price chart with 'WTI -12% $83' in glowing red digits, and a highlighted map of the Strait of Hormuz. Camera flashes from news photographers create bright bursts of light across the navy-blue press conference hall. Dramatic side lighting on his face conveying authority and geopolitical weight. His figure and the display fill the upper 60% of the frame, making the geopolitical context immediately readable. Deep navy blue background with vivid red chart accents and gold podium highlights. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 B 실사. 최태원 SK그룹 회장(Chey Tae-won, SK Group Chairman)이 밝고 자신감 있는 표정으로 SK하이닉스 HBM4 메모리 칩을 손에 들고 카메라를 응시하는 장면. 뒤쪽 대형 스크린에 'SK하이닉스 영업이익 40조' 초록 급등 차트와 HBM4 점유율 그래프가 표시됨. 골드 액센트 조명이 최태원 회장과 칩에 비춘다.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic cinematic portrait of Chey Tae-won (SK Group Chairman, Korean man in his 60s in a dark navy suit) holding up a gleaming SK hynix HBM4 memory chip proudly toward the camera with a confident warm smile. Behind him, a large display screen shows 'SK하이닉스 영업이익 40조' in large bright green numbers with a sharply rising chart and HBM4 market share graphics dominating the screen. Golden accent lighting illuminates his face and the metallic chip in his hand, creating strong highlights against the deep navy blue corporate background. His figure and the display fill the upper 60% of the frame, making the semiconductor prosperity context immediately readable. Bright vivid green chart colors contrast with the warm gold on Chey. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 와일드카드. A vs B 대조. 왼쪽에 트럼프 대통령이 팔짱을 끼고 냉소적 표정으로 호르무즈 해협 봉쇄 지도 앞에 서 있고, 오른쪽에 이재명 대통령이 미소를 지으며 코스피 6226 초록 전광판 앞에 서 있는 장면. 중앙에 날카로운 대각선 분리 — 위험 vs 기회의 대조.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic split-composition image. Left side: Donald Trump (US President, blond hair, dark suit with red tie) standing with arms crossed and a cold smirk, in front of a military map of the Strait of Hormuz with red blockade markers and 'BLOCKADE MAINTAINED' text overlay. Cold harsh red-navy lighting on his side conveying geopolitical threat. Right side: Lee Jae-myung (South Korean President, Korean man in his 60s in navy suit with glasses) smiling confidently, standing in front of a bright green stock display showing 'KOSPI 6,226 ▲2.21%' with Samsung and SK hynix tickers surging. Warm golden lighting illuminates his celebratory side. A sharp diagonal line of light divides the two sides through the center. Left side radiates cold red danger, right side radiates warm gold prosperity. Both leaders shown from chest up with their respective context clearly visible in the upper 60% of the frame. Deep navy background on both sides with bright vivid accent colors. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements.
